titleStmt.title: SII 9.364: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 364. (A.R. No. 498 of 1915.) ON A STONE LYING IN A FIELD NEAR DEVARABETTA, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated the 12th year of the reign of the Yādava king Siṅgaṇadēva, Pramōdūta, Māgha, śu. 2, Ādivāra. In Pramōdūta, Māgha śu. 2 fell on Tuesday (not Sunday) 18th January A.D. 1211. If, however, Māgha is a mistake for Pausha the date would be equivalent to A.D. 1210 December 19 Sunday. It records the gift of the toll-revenue of Moladakallu by Bhilluva-Nāyaka, who was in charge of the tolls of Sindavāḍi one-thousand in the manne of Jagadāḷa Sōmaya-Nāyaka, for the service of the god Mallikārjuna.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
nama(ḥ)stuṁgaśiraḥcuṁbicaṁdracāmara
cāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁ
bhāya śaṁbhavē . yādavacakravartti śrīpa si
ṁgaṇadēvananantabhūmiyaṁ sādhisi rājyamaṁ
paḍedu pāḷisalātanaṁ ya baḷada
lakṣmigadhipatiyātana maneverggaḍe sādhitarā
yavairi jagadāḷasōmeyanāyakāṁkusaṁ .
Ātana maneyoḷu khyātaṁ suṁkādhikāri
samōdyōtaṁ nāyakapadavikhyātaṁ dharmmadēva
poḍevuttellaṁ . kaṁdaṁ . janakaṁ daṁḍanā
yakana tana Arddhāṁgi
yenalukātana nāyakaṁ
. Aṁtu nāda bhilluvanāyakaṁ paṁ
camahāsabda siṁgaṇadēvavaruṣada 12 neya pra
mōdōthasaṁvatsarada māgha suddha 2 Ādivāra
daṁdu śrīmallikārjunedēvargge śrīmanumahāpra
dhānaṁ jagadāḷa sōmayanāyakana manneyoḷu śrīma
tu siṁdavāḍi sāyirada suṁkādhikāri bhillavanāyaka
ṁ mallikārjjunadēvarige dhūpadīpakke moladakalloḷu suṁ
ka taḷa sārige hoṟa voḷage suṁ
kavesaralu yēnādaḍaṁ dēvarggeyācaṁdrārkkatāraṁba
raṁ tripurāṁtakagurugaḷige dhārāpūrvvakavāgi mā
ḍidaru maṁgaḷa mahāśrī . sudattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō
harēti vasuṁdhara saṣṭirvvarṣasahasrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ
jāyatē krimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 9.364 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
